 On 2013-May-09, 14:27, Thierry Thomas wrote:
 > 	The new release of cad/opencascade could use FreeImage, but the
 > 	C++ wrapper (freeimageplus) is required.
 >=20
 > 	This wrapper is included in the same tarball, so I think that a
 > 	slave port is the best solution.
 >=20
 > 	The attached patch freeimage.diff transforms the original
 > 	Makefile into a master port, and freeimageplus.shar produces the
 > 	slave port.
 
 Thanks for this Thierry. I'm fine with it as a solution, but did you
 also consider just adding the c++ wrapper to the original port, so that
 both the C and the C++ interfaces are installed? It's just matter of an
 extra header file and an extra library (plus symlinks), no big deal for
 users.
 
 --=20
 Pietro Cerutti
 The FreeBSD Project
